title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people choosing clothes. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: Two girls are choosing clothes in a shop. One girl is holding up a jacket and showing it to her friend. There are clothes on racks, a mirror and shopping bags nearby.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows someone taking photographs. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: A young man is taking photographs in a city park. He is holding a camera and looking at some flowers beside a path. There are trees, benches and people walking in the background.

followUp.question: Talk about the person. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
